type.name: type_archive_object
type.wiki: +section title="Object: {{name wrap=true}}" +row +col-8 {{description wikify="true"}} :vspace 1em +tabs cullEmpty=true +tab Information {{information showDetails="true" showTitle="false" showMetadata=false }} {{properties message="" metadata.types="!tag:archiveinternal,!tag:archivecultural,!tag:internal" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="false" }} -tab +tab Traditional Knowledge {{properties stripe=false propertyToggleLimit=100 message="" metadata.types="tag:archivecultural" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="false" }} -tab -tabs -col +col-4 +center {{new_entry fromEntry="true" class="ramadda-button-small" message=""}} -center {{new_property fromEntry="true" showToggle="true" class="ramadda-button-small" addEditPropertiesLink="true"}} +center {{image inherited="true" message="" width="150px" style="margin-bottom:10px;" useThumbnail="true"}} {{barcode field=barcode}} -center {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="content.license" includeTitle=false}} +if anonymous=false {{properties message="" propertyToggleLimit=0 metadata.types="tag:archiveinternal" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="true" }} -if :vspace 1em {{list includeIcon="true" details="false" entries="siblings,links" message="" box.maxheight="200" xbox.class="entry-sidebox" prefix="====Related====" xblock.show="true" xblock.title="Related" xblock.open="false"}} -col -row -section
